prestazioni: Engine swap to a fully built *BP-Z3* (1.8L DOHC 16V) with forged internals: Manley forged pistons (8.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL Race Series bearings, and a Tomei 264°/260° camshaft kit with adjustable vernier pulleys for precise valve timing. Pair with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system with a GReddy Revolution RS cat-back and a HKS SSQV blow-off valve.

Fuel system upgrade: Injector Dynamics ID1000x injectors, Walbro 255 LPH in-tank fuel pump, and a Sard 1,000cc fuel rail with an AEM 320LPH external pump for E85 compatibility. ECU reflash via a Haltech Elite 2500 standalone unit with custom maps for 300+ WHP on 98 RON + E30 blend, including knock control via a Defi Advance BF knock monitor.

Suspension and drivetrain: Tein Flex Z coilovers with 8kg/mm front and 6kg/mm rear springs, Cusco 22mm front and 19mm rear adjustable sway bars, and a Cusco 1.5-way mechanical LSD for the *G56M-R* 6-speed transmission. Braking system includes Endless CC-R6 front brake pads with DBA 4000 Series rotors and a custom braided stainless steel brake line kit from Goodridge.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Version 3 widebody kit with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front canards, and a duckbill rear spoiler. Front bumper lip replaced with a Veilside Fortune 03-style lip, and side skirts extended with custom aluminum panels to cover the widened track.

OEM+ JDM-spec exterior: Mazda factory *B20* Montego Blue Mica paint with a 3M Matte Clear Bra top coat, JDM-spec *BP-DE* 15x8 +33 Enkei PF05 wheels in Gunmetal with 205/50R15 Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires. Rear quarter windows replaced with JDM-spec *BP* Familia GTR smoked glass, and OEM *B20* rear wiper deleted for a cleaner look.

Interior overhaul: Bride Zeta III bucket seats with Takata 4-point harnesses, Momo Prototipo steering wheel with a NRG quick-release hub, and a custom roll cage by AutoPower Industries with a bolt-in 6-point design. Dashboard and door cards wrapped in Alcantara with red stitching, and a Defi BF gauges pod mounted on the A-pillar for boost, oil pressure, and wideband AFR monitoring.
